instruction: Help me organize the KPI data into the digest file

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Metric'
ws['B1'] = 'Target'
ws['C1'] = 'Actual'
ws['D1'] = 'Achievement(%)'
ws['A2'] = 'Annual Revenue(10K CNY)'
ws['B2'] = 8000
ws['C2'] = 8640
ws['D2'] = 108
ws['A3'] = 'Net Profit Margin(%)'
ws['B3'] = 18
ws['C3'] = 20.5
ws['D3'] = 113.9
ws['A4'] = 'New Clients'
ws['B4'] = 300
ws['C4'] = 342
ws['D4'] = 114
ws['A5'] = 'Employee Satisfaction(%)'
ws['B5'] = 88
ws['C5'] = 91.5
ws['D5'] = 104
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/performance_kpi.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me organize the KPI data into the digest file
Read the annual revenue achievement rate from /home/user/Desktop/performance_kpi.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/kpi_digest.txt: 'Annual Revenue Achievement: 108% (actual 86.4M CNY)', save
